project.name: AgentHub
project.description: AgentHub is an IM-style web chat application that serves as a smart collaboration hub for multiple AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode). It features multi-agent group sessions via @mentions, Docker sandbox isolation per session, WebSocket-driven streaming, DAG-based task orchestration with BullMQ, and artifact preview/editing with deployment.

layers.name: Frontend (React Chat UI)
layers.description: React 18 + Vite + Tailwind + Zustand — chat interface, streaming display, agent status panels, artifact preview cards

layers.name: Backend API (Hono Routes)
layers.description: Hono REST API — auth, sessions, chat, agents, workspace, deploy, preview routes

layers.name: Agent Execution Layer
layers.description: Sandbox lifecycle, provider abstraction (ClaudeCodeProcess/Provider), event parsing, task orchestration

layers.name: WebSocket & State Management
layers.description: WebSocket handler, session state, diff broadcasting, multi-agent coordination, cleanup

layers.name: Backend Infrastructure
layers.description: Database (Prisma), auth middleware, config, startup sequence

layers.name: Shared Types Package
layers.description: Shared TypeScript interfaces (User, Session, Message, Agent, Artifact, etc.) used by both frontend and backend

layers.name: Docker & Infrastructure
layers.description: Docker sandbox image, Docker Compose, Nginx config — containerization and deployment

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: PRD, RUNBOOK, CLAUDE.md, and archived plans — project specification and operational docs

layers.name: Configuration Files
layers.description: TypeScript configs, package.json manifests, environment templates — build and runtime configuration

tour.title: 项目概述
tour.description: 从 README 和 PRD 了解 AgentHub 的项目愿景：一个 IM 聊天式的多平台 AI Agent 协作中枢（Smart Hub）。

tour.title: 后端入口与启动流程
tour.description: index.ts 是后端入口，负责清理孤儿容器、seed agent、注册 Provider、挂载路由、启动 WebSocket。

tour.title: Agent 执行引擎
tour.description: 核心执行层：SandboxManager 管理 Docker 沙箱，ClaudeCodeProcess 派生子进程，EventParser 解析 stream-json 输出，Provider 抽象层解耦多平台接入。

tour.title: WebSocket 实时通信
tour.description: WebSocket handler 是中枢：多路复用流式推送、权限代理、diff 广播、多 Agent 并行调度、session 生命周期管理。

tour.title: 前端聊天界面
tour.description: ChatView 是前端核心组件：消息气泡流、Agent 状态面板、Diff/Deploy/Test/Security 卡片渲染、底部输入栏。

tour.title: 状态管理与数据流
tour.description: Zustand store 管理全局状态（会话、消息、agent 事件、diff 卡片、部署状态）。useChat hook 封装 WebSocket 连接和事件分发。

tour.title: 共享类型与契约
tour.description: packages/shared 定义前后端接口契约，确保类型安全的消息传递和 API 调用。
